description_long: This is a modern outdoor chaise suspended from a robust, arched metal frame by four sturdy chains. The seat is constructed from several horizontal wooden slats, gently curved to provide ergonomic support and comfort. The frame is made of tubular metal with a dark finish, forming a stable base and an overhead arch for suspension. The chains are attached at four points, ensuring the seat hangs securely and can gently swing. The wood of the seat features a visible grain pattern, adding a natural aesthetic to the otherwise industrial design. This chaise is suitable for parks, gardens, or urban relaxation areas, offering both durability and style.
description: A suspended outdoor chaise with a curved wooden slat seat, hanging from a dark arched metal frame by chains. The design is both sturdy and visually appealing, ideal for urban parks or relaxation spaces.
description_view_0: The chaise is seen from a front angle, highlighting the curved wooden seat, the arching metal frame, and the suspension chains.
description_view_1: A direct side view shows the full length of the wooden slat seat and the symmetrical arch of the metal frame.
description_view_2: This angled view mirrors view 0, emphasizing the seat's curvature and the chain suspension from the frame.
description_view_3: A direct front view displays the width of the seat, the even spacing of the wooden slats, and the parallel alignment of the frame legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is formed by the upper portion of the curved wooden slats, rising gently from the seat and following the same ergonomic arc. It is unsegmented, with no additional padding or decorative elements, and provides a continuous, smooth support surface.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no traditional armrests; the seat is open on both sides, with the metal frame arching above and to the sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are part of the continuous arched metal frame, extending from the ground upward in a smooth, rounded curve. They are tubular, sturdy, and finished in a matte black, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no fabric upholstery; the seat consists of wooden slats with a visible natural wood grain pattern, arranged horizontally and evenly spaced.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no cushions present; the seating surface is formed entirely by the curved wooden slats, with no attached or loose padding.
